# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data. Focus on getting the instances running quickly. We'll add encryption and backup policies in phase 2 after we validate the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: EC2 instances with EBS volumes for our application data
Resources:
  MyEc2Instance:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Instance
    Properties:
      ImageId: ami-xxxxxxxxxxxxxxx # Replace this with the AMI ID for your desired Linux distribution (e.g., Amazon Linux 2)
      InstanceType: t2.micro # Choose an appropriate instance type based on your requirements
      KeyName: YourKeyPairName # The name of your EC2 key pair
      BlockDeviceMappings:
        - DeviceName: /dev/xvda1
          EBSDevice:
            VolumeSize: 8
            VolumeType: gp2

  MyEbsVolume:
    Type: AWS::EC2::Volume
    Properties:
      AvailabilityZone: !Ref 'AWS::Region'
      Size: 50
      VolumeType: gp2
